rawAssistant:
Considering your prepared vibe and the road ahead, I'd recommend a few essentials to keep you going. First, a new road kit might be wise, with some strong vials of potion to help with any grit or grime you encounter on that north road. A charm or two could also come in handy – perhaps something that'll ward off unwanted attention from those glowing creatures? Lastly, a small pouch of Cold Salve wouldn't go amiss; can never be too careful when it comes to burns and whatnot.

By the way, I did notice you're still wearing that travel cloak. Still dry, at least!
